title: Cockroach Mod
description: It's a simple mod that adds a cockroach entity they don't spawn but you can breed them with rotten flesh to get baby cockroaches. Overall it is a fun extension that will enhance your gameplay.
body:
Minecraft enthusiasts, rejoice! A new mod has been released that will take your gaming experience to the next level. Introducing the Cockroach and Fly Swatter Mod! 

This mod adds two new things to the game: a Cockroach Entity and a Fly Swatter. The cockroaches are small, fast, and hard to hit, making them a challenging new addition to the game. 

But fear not, as the Fly Swatter has also been added to the game. This new tool is the perfect weapon against the pesky Cockroaches.

Overall, the Cockroach and Fly Swatter Mod is a fun and exciting addition to Minecraft that adds a new level of challenge to the game. Give it a try and see how many Cockroaches you can swat!

(It does not spawn cockroaches this just adds the cockroach but I might add spawning later and make the Fly Swatter Do more damage)
